commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P2] No repair lane is needed because I found no actionable patch defect and the contributor supplied after-fix runtime proof.; Cleared: The diff touches local state-file persistence only, adds no dependency or workflow execution surface, preserves private 0600 file creation, and keeps approval-index no-overwrite semantics. (sha=3deff0efb07226293445bacf81e13d3761a0d0af)
commands.review_summary:
The branch routes diff snapshot writes through atomic storage, treats malformed diff and approval-index JSON as missing state, adds an exclusive approval-index writer with hard-link and direct wx fallback paths, and adds regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main parses malformed diff snapshots and approval-index files before it can recover, while only ENOENT is handled in the affected read paths. I did not run a live SIGKILL harness under the read-only review constraint.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair lane is needed because I found no actionable patch defect and the contributor supplied after-fix runtime proof.

target.title: fix: harden diff and approval state writes
target.body:
## Summary
- Treat corrupt diff snapshots as cache misses and rewrite them atomically.
- Treat corrupt approval ID index entries as expired/missing instead of crashing resume.
- Preserve no-overwrite approval index writes with a hard-link atomic path, plus a direct `wx` exclusive-create fallback for filesystems that do not support hard links.
- Removed the PR-owned changelog entry so release notes stay release-owned.

## Review follow-up
- Added the requested portability path for hard-link failures (`ENOSYS`, `ENOTSUP`, `EOPNOTSUPP`, `EPERM`, `EXDEV`) without overwriting an existing approval mapping.
- Added test coverage for the unsupported-hard-link fallback and the existing no-overwrite guarantee.

## Proof
Runtime proof from the built code:

```text
diff-corrupt-proof {"before":null,"changed":true,"after":{"ok":true}}
approval-resume-exit=2
approval-resume-stdout={
  "protocolVersion": 1,
  "ok": false,
  "error": {
    "type": "parse_error",
    "message": "Approval ID \"deadbeef\" not found or expired"
  }
}
approval-resume-stderr=
exclusive-fallback-proof {"mode":"600","secondCode":"EEXIST","content":"{\"stateKey\":\"original\"}\n"}
```

## Validation
- `pnpm --config.minimum-release-age=0 run format`
- `pnpm --config.minimum-release-age=0 run build`
- `node --test dist/test/state.test.js dist/test/approval_id.test.js --test-name-pattern 'corrupt|approval index writes never overwrite|writeFileAtomicExclusive|falls back'`
- `pnpm --config.minimum-release-age=0 run test` (247 tests passed)
